days.name: 30-Day Build Challenge Dashboard
days.what_it_does: Admin tool for tracking 30 builds in 30 days. Logs the build, the post, the numbers, and the human data. Built for Jay and Ian to stay accountable, get the endorphin hits, and prove the system works.

days.name: The Smart 404 Page
days.what_it_does: Catches lost visitors instead of bouncing them. Pre-fills a search box from the broken URL, emails the owner the moment a real broken link is hit, and turns the dead end into an on-brand drag-and-drop game with a leaderboard for return visits.
days.who_for: Small business owners running content or service sites where stale links from Google, old social posts, or referrers still send people in — and where bounce rate quietly bleeds traffic they paid to acquire.

days.name: No-Wasted-Quotes Tool
days.what_it_does: A 6-question filter that qualifies trade enquiries before they reach the inbox. Good-fit leads get the quote CTA + an inline contact form. Maybe-fit leads get asked for photos and details first. Bad-fit leads get no contact CTA, just a redirect to a relevant resource. Built around a real Bay of Plenty roofer (Bradley Roofing) so the rules-based logic uses real services, real area, real budget thresholds. Customer-facing live demo on the client subdomain plus a strategic case-study landing page on the main site.
days.who_for: Quote-heavy trade businesses (roofers, plumbers, sparkies, HVAC, builders, landscapers) who pay for leads and lose nights quoting jobs that were never serious.

days.name: Public challenge page
days.what_it_does: plainblackcreative.com/challenge - the live tracker the world can see. Fetches real data from the JSON file.

days.name: Which Service Do I Need? decision tool
days.what_it_does: For a professional services business. User picks their situation, tool directs them to the right service. Removes the "I don't know what to book" friction.

days.name: McIndoe Media reveal day
days.what_it_does: Nothing new. This is Brandon's reveal day. McIndoe Media goes public.

days.name: Week 1 Report
days.what_it_does: Blog post + all social. Real numbers from the dashboard. Human check-in included.

days.name: Instant Quote Range Tool
days.what_it_does: Not exact pricing. A range with expectation-setting. "Jobs like this typically run between $X and $Y depending on [variables]." For trades or home services.

days.name: What Should I Order? menu helper
days.what_it_does: Interactive menu helper for a cafe or restaurant. 2-3 questions (dietary, mood, time of day), recommends menu items. Increases average order value and improves customer experience.

days.name: Blog + Social Media Generator
days.what_it_does: One topic in, four outputs out: full blog post, Facebook post, LinkedIn post, and SEO metadata. Tuned to your voice so it sounds like you, not generic ChatGPT. Day 10 ships a live demo on a Bay of Plenty cafe with the four PB-tuned outputs side-by-side against the same prompt run through vanilla ChatGPT.
days.who_for: Small business owners who know they should be posting daily but stare at the blank screen every night. Cafes, tradies, retailers, professional services. People who tried ChatGPT, hated the AI slop, and gave up.
days.published_url: Slug suggestion: today-i-built-a-blog-and-social-generator-that-doesnt-sound-like-chatgpt (so the URL itself signals the differentiator). Full URL fills in when you publish.

days.name: Problem to Solution Generator
days.what_it_does: User types their problem in plain language. Tool reframes it as a service and suggests the right solution. "I keep losing leads after the first call" -> "You need a follow-up sequence. Here's where to start."

days.name: Before You Book Checklist
days.what_it_does: Interactive checklist for a service business. "Are you ready to book? Here's what to know first." Reduces bad-fit enquiries, no-shows, and first-call confusion.

days.name: Branded System announcement
days.what_it_does: Nothing new. This is the Branded System announcement. The first time the $1,499 tier is named publicly and clearly.

days.name: Week 2 Report
days.what_it_does: Same format as week 1. More data. Real pipeline numbers.

days.name: Is This Worth Fixing? tool
days.what_it_does: For trades and repairs. User inputs the issue, tool suggests repair, replace, or urgency level. Positions the tradie as the expert before they even quote.

days.name: Local Trust Builder Page
days.what_it_does: A single-page site that answers the top 5 objections for a specific local business, shows proof, and guides a decision. Pick a real niche (recommend: HVAC or electrical contractor in a NZ/AU city).

days.name: AI Brain post (content day)
days.what_it_does: Content day. Deep dive into what makes the blog-gen different from generic AI content tools.

days.name: What Happens Next page
days.what_it_does: Post-enquiry explainer for a service business. After someone enquires, this page explains the process step by step, reduces anxiety, and increases conversion from lead to booked job.

days.name: Feature one of the live playbooks
days.what_it_does: Nothing new. Feature one of the 7 live playbooks properly. Pick the one most relevant to what's resonated in weeks 1-3 (check dashboard data to decide which).

days.name: Internal intake form (V3 schema as tool)
days.what_it_does: Something PlainBlack uses internally. The intake form (the V3 schema built as an interactive tool). A 10-section guided intake that produces a structured client brief. This is the tool that makes every playbook and Branded System build better.

days.name: Week 3 Report
days.what_it_does: Three weeks in. Real pipeline data. Conversations that are open.

days.name: Diagnostic quiz (What should I do first?)
days.what_it_does: "What should I do first?" 5-7 questions about their business, output: their biggest opportunity and a product recommendation ($99 playbook, $1,499 Branded System, or free Brand Spark). This is the missing funnel piece identified in the strategy docs.

days.name: Google Reviews AI Response Tool
days.what_it_does: Paste in a review, get an AI-drafted response in the business's voice. For hospitality, retail, or any review-heavy business. Demo it on a fake cafe review.

days.name: Trades season outreach generator
days.what_it_does: Roofing or HVAC season outreach generator. Input: location, season, common problem for the season. Output: outreach message, Google Business post, and a door-knock script. Specifically for residential trades doing proactive outreach.

days.name: 30-day content calendar generator
days.what_it_does: Input: business type, primary service, location. Output: 30 post ideas with hooks, format suggestions, and platform recommendations. One month of content, done in 2 minutes.

days.name: Brand Voice Checker
days.what_it_does: Paste in any piece of copy (a bio, a service description, an ad). Tool analyses it and tells you whether it sounds like you or like everyone else. Flags jargon, generic phrases, and weak positioning.

days.name: Are You Ready to Scale? assessment
days.what_it_does: 10 questions about their business, marketing, and operations. Output: a readiness score and a clear recommendation. Sets up the Branded System conversation naturally.

days.name: Week 4 Report
days.what_it_does: The big one. Full 30-day data summary. Everything visible.

days.name: What we learned post
days.what_it_does: Nothing new. Jayden writes "What we learned" post. Ian reads it on camera.

days.name: The close - Branded System page
days.what_it_does: The close. Branded System page goes live on the site (if not already up). The challenge page gets a "It's done" banner.
